name: vite
description: Vite best practices: VITE_-prefix env security, dep pre-bundling, code splitting and manualChunks, base for sub-path deploys, dev server.proxy, define stringify pitfalls, import.meta.glob, asset handling, build.target alignment, SSR, library mode, plugin order, HMR guards, version-aware against the locked vite version and vite.config. Includes /vite:review.
